title: 無限軌道計畫｜Infinite Rail Project
description: 無限軌道計畫是由舞秋風發起，聚集了不同 Youtuber 的企劃，主要模組為 Create & 農夫樂事，來開始蓋鐵路吧！ —— Infinite Rail Project is a collaboration initiated by 舞秋風, bringing together different YouTubers. With Create and Farmer’s Delight as the core mods, it’s time to start building railways!
body:
![官網][logo]
[![Modrinth][modrinth-badge]][modrinth-link] [![官網][website-badge]][website-link] [![Youtube][youtube-badge]][youtube-link]
--- 「無限軌道計畫」是一個以 **Create 動力機械模組**為核心的 Minecraft 模組包，主打**火車與自動化建設**。 同時結合**農夫樂事**與其擴展模組，讓你在農耕與料理中享受悠閒生活。 除此之外，還加入了**多種裝飾模組與趣味模組**，使建築具美感、冒險更加有趣。 這個模組包非常適合喜歡**機械設計與鐵道建設**的玩家，也很適合和朋友們一同合作，打造專屬的**鐵路王國**。 無論是建設鐵路、建造機械，還是務農烹飪 —— 想怎麼玩，就怎麼玩！ --- ## 🚩 Q&A 常見問題 以下整理了一些常見問題，方便你快速了解模組包的特性與使用方式。 1. **Q：為什麼我的介面和別人看起來不一樣？** **A：** 因為每個人會依照自己的喜好安裝不同的模組、資源包與光影，所以介面效果會有所差異。 2. **Q：這個模組包會上傳到 CurseForge 嗎？** **A：** 不會。由於缺少許多必要模組，因此無法上傳到 CurseForge。若有需要，可以直接下載 [Infinite Rail Project.zip][mrpack2zip-zip]，匯入後即可使用。（連結會自動生成並下載本模組包的 `.zip` 檔案） （此 `.zip` 檔案由 [Modrinth Pack to Zip Converter][mrpack-to-zip] 專案生成，詳細說明可參考該專案的網站文件。） 3. **Q：有提供伺服器啟動壓縮檔嗎？** **A：** 有的。你可以直接下載 [server.jar][mrpack4server-jar]，執行後即可快速啟動伺服器並遊玩本模組包。若需要更新，只要重新下載最新的 `server.jar` 檔案即可。 （此 `server.jar` 由 [mrpack4server][mrpack-for-server] 專案生成，詳細說明可參考該專案的文件。） 4. **Q：儲物終端的介面不好辨識，該怎麼辦？** **A：** 建議安裝 [Tom's Better Create Storage][toms-better-create-storage] 資源包，能讓介面更清晰、乾淨。 5. **Q：為什麼在伺服器中會遇到以下情況？** a. 影片中能右鍵採收，但伺服器或單人玩沒辦法 b. 營火旁沒有影片中的特殊效果 c. 單人能刷出交易水果的村民，但多人中刷不出 **A：** 這通常是因為伺服器缺少**伺服器限定模組**或 `config` 設定未正確套用。若直接使用啟動器下載的檔案來開伺服器，會缺少伺服器端模組，導致部分功能無法正常運作。 建議做法： - 使用 **Q.3 的 mrpack4server 工具**生成 `server.jar`，確保伺服器端模組與設定完整。 - 每次更新都重新生成或下載最新的 `server.jar`，並覆蓋 `config` 資料夾，確保所有修改生效。 - （**記得每次進行更新時一定要做備份**） - 如果不想直接使用生成的 `server.jar`，也可以將工具當作生成器，產生新版模組與設定，再把生成的內容轉移到你使用的開服軟體中使用。
English Description **Infinite Rail Project** is a Minecraft modpack built around the **Create mod**, focusing on **trains and automation**. It also integrates **Farmer’s Delight** and its add-ons, allowing you to enjoy a relaxing life of farming and cooking. On top of that, the pack includes a variety of **decoration and fun mods**, making your builds more aesthetic and your adventures even more enjoyable. This modpack is perfect for players who love **mechanical design and railway construction**, and it’s also great for playing together with friends to create your very own **railway kingdom**. Whether it’s building railroads, designing machines, or farming and cooking — **play the game your way!** --- ## 🚩 Q&A Here are some frequently asked questions to help you quickly understand the features and usage of this modpack. 1. **Q: Why does my interface look different from others?** **A:** Because everyone installs different mods, resource packs, and shaders based on their personal preferences, the interface may look different. 2. **Q: Will this modpack be uploaded to CurseForge?** **A:** No. Since many essential mods are missing, it cannot be uploaded to CurseForge. If needed, you can directly download [Infinite Rail Project.zip][mrpack2zip-zip] and import it. (The link automatically generates and downloads the `.zip` version of this modpack.) (This `.zip` file is generated by the [Modrinth Pack to Zip Converter][mrpack-to-zip] project. For more details, please refer to its documentation.) 3. **Q: Is there a server startup archive available?** **A:** Yes. You can directly download [server.jar][mrpack4server-jar], run it, and the server will start immediately, allowing you to play this modpack. To update, simply download the latest `server.jar` again. (This `server.jar` is generated by the [mrpack4server][mrpack-for-server] project. For more details, please refer to its documentation.) 4. **Q: The storage terminal interface is hard to read. What should I do?** **A:** It is recommended to install the [Tom's Better Create Storage][toms-better-create-storage] resource pack, which makes the interface clearer and cleaner.
